title: From The Woods
description: adds a scary man! to your world!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/XmWnX2Wp0qM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>






Adds a new horror creature that inhabits forest biomes

The entity manifests only when the player is inside wooded areas

Focuses on tension, strange sounds, and unpredictable encounters

Behavior Around Players

Moves around near the player instead of always attacking directly

Can interact with the environment to create fear, such as:

Tree and wood creaking sounds

Footsteps nearby

Breaking placed torches

Knocking on doors and windows

May attack if the player stays in the forest too long

Danger Conditions

More active and threatening at night

Activity increases during thunderstorms

Some events trigger when the player is not looking directly at the source
